SHADOWFALL-MIRROR_MIRROR.title: Mirror Mirror
SHADOWFALL-MIRROR_MIRROR.pages.INITIAL.d: Mirror, mirror on the wall, who is the most pain in the ass event of them all?
SHADOWFALL-MIRROR_MIRROR.pages.INITIAL.o: Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]6[/blue] cards from the Parallel World to add to your deck.

Choose [blue]3[/blue] of [blue]18[/blue] cards from the Parallel World to add to your deck. Gain [green]{ReplaceCharMaxHp}[/green] Max HP and replace your character with the one from the Parallel World.
SHADOWFALL-MIRROR_MIRROR.pages.TAKE_CARD: Take 1 of 6 cards from your parallel self.
SHADOWFALL-MIRROR_MIRROR.pages.REPLACED_: Take 3 of 18 cards from your parallel self.
SHADOWFALL-MIRROR_MIRROR.pages.GAINED_MA: You walked away without interacting with the mirror
